fields.value: 2 SKUs · 32 units — incl. 8 units of Bird Pot Feet (51GR1907)

closingText.text: O-50027 is Magnolia's PhaseOut clearance pickup — 8 units of Bird Pot Feet (which is down to 16 units total) plus a Bird Garden Stake refill. Beth still has to submit it. Worth pushing today because the Bird Pot Feet inventory is about to run out. Want me to draft a ping to Beth?
